
== {task_instructions} ==

Given the current request from the {AI assistant}, follow the following steps:

1) Think through your reasoning checklist under {external_agent_thought} above.

2) Provide a clear and concise summary of your thought process: the status of the current {sub-task}, what you plan to do next, and how you maintain consistency with the {task_requirements}.

3) Based on your reasoning, formulate your final answer that will be given to the {AI assistant}. Your response text will be passed to the {AI assistant} directly, so take care of what you say.

Your final answer must not contain any placeholders for information. You have to come up with plausible options from your {package_options}.
